name: Surface Water Quality
description: Rivers, streams, wetlands, and lakes potentially affected by construction and operational discharges
regulatory_basis: Fisheries Act s. 35, BC Water Sustainability Act

name: Groundwater
description: Subsurface water resources and aquifer connectivity
regulatory_basis: BC Water Sustainability Act, Canadian Drinking Water Guidelines

name: Fish and Fish Habitat
description: Spawning, rearing, and migration habitat for freshwater and anadromous fish species

name: Boreal Caribou
description: Southern Mountain and Boreal caribou populations listed as Threatened under SARA
regulatory_basis: Species at Risk Act Schedule 1, Federal Recovery Strategy

name: Migratory Birds
description: Nesting, breeding, and stopover habitat for migratory bird species
regulatory_basis: Migratory Birds Convention Act, MBCA Regulations

name: Wildlife and Wildlife Habitat
description: General terrestrial wildlife including mammals, amphibians, and reptiles
regulatory_basis: BC Wildlife Act, Provincial Wildlife Management Plans

name: Traditional Land Use
description: Indigenous peoples' traditional harvesting, gathering, cultural, and spiritual land use practices
regulatory_basis: Impact Assessment Act s. 22(1)(c), Constitution Act s. 35

name: Indigenous Rights and Title
description: Aboriginal and Treaty rights including self-governance, resource harvesting, and territorial rights

name: Soil and Terrain Stability
description: Terrain stability, permafrost integrity, erosion potential, and soil contamination

name: Air Quality
description: Ambient air quality including NOx, SO2, PM2.5, and VOC emissions
regulatory_basis: BC Clean Air Act, CCME Standards

name: Greenhouse Gas Emissions
description: Direct and indirect GHG contributions from construction and operation
regulatory_basis: Impact Assessment Act s. 22(1)(i), BC CleanBC Plan

name: Vegetation and Wetlands
description: Terrestrial vegetation communities, rare plants, old growth, and wetland ecosystems
regulatory_basis: BC Forest and Range Practices Act, Federal Wetland Policy

name: Noise and Vibration
description: Construction and operational noise impacts on wildlife and human receptors
regulatory_basis: BC Noise Guidelines, Health Canada Noise Assessment Guidelines

name: Visual Landscape
description: Visual quality and landscape aesthetics in the project area

name: Human Health
description: Potential health risks from contaminant exposure, noise, and air quality degradation
